parameters.jsonBody:
={"prompt": "You are Hermes's self-improvement module. Analyze outreach performance and update memory.

Leads from last 2 weeks (sample):
{{ JSON.stringify($('Fetch Last 2 Weeks Leads').all().map(i=>i.json).slice(0,30)) }}

Current memory:
{{ JSON.stringify($('Fetch Hermes Memory').all().map(i=>i.json)) }}

Goal performance:
{{ JSON.stringify($('Fetch Last Week Hermes Goals').all().map(i=>i.json)) }}

Analyze:
1. What % of leads reached stage 2+ (replied) — this is reply_rate
2. What opener patterns appeared in leads that progressed furthest
3. What disqualify signals appeared in stuck/unqualified leads
4. Best estimated send time if inferrable
5. Are we hitting goals? What to adjust?

Return ONLY valid JSON:
{
  "avg_reply_rate": "X%",
  "best_opener_pattern": "describe pattern",
  "disqualify_signals": "comma-separated signals",
  "best_send_time": "morning|afternoon|evening|unknown",
  "improvement_note": "1-2 sentence insight",
  "goal_hit_rate": "X/Y goals met"
}", "model": "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", "max_tokens": 600}

={ "from_agent": "Hermes", "message": "Self-improve complete. Reply rate: {{ $('Parse Hermes Analysis').first().json.avg_reply_rate }}. {{ $('Parse Hermes Analysis').first().json.goal_hit_rate }} goals hit. Insight: {{ $('Parse Hermes Analysis').first().json.improvement_note }}", "metadata": { "type": "self_improve", "reply_rate": "{{ $('Parse Hermes Analysis').first().json.avg_reply_rate }}", "best_send_time": "{{ $('Parse Hermes Analysis').first().json.best_send_time }}" } }
